jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.lint: passed with existing client-effect warnings where applicable
lastHealthyBaseline.tests: full Vitest passed 176/176 files and 724/724 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws, and caddy active; /api/status healthy; major HTML/API probes returned 307/401/200 without 500; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: Fresh comprehensive audit checkpoint after successful remediation threshold
lastRun.summary: Ran the required broad checkpoint audit after the success counter exceeded the configured threshold. No immediate production blocker or code-level defect was found during this pass; backlog was refreshed with the carried P1 long-running storage/SFTP sync task UX item and bounded-list performance candidates.
validation: checked git status and local HEAD equals origin/main at start
polled previous background build/runtime build; both passed
production services vcontrolhub-next.service, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, and caddy.service active
major production route probes returned 307/401/200 without 500
recent production logs checked; no error/warn entries
no overlapping remediation/build/test process detected beyond editor TypeScript servers
existing full Vitest baseline passed 176/176 files and 724/724 tests earlier in this audit cycle
existing typecheck and lint baselines passed earlier in this audit cycle
existing smoke test baseline passed 19/19 earlier in this audit cycle
static scans reconfirmed no shipped confirm/prompt/reload calls and no remaining internal app anchors under src/app
reviewed SFTP sync/import surface and bounded findMany candidates for next deployable batch selection
lastRun.deployment: No code/runtime change in this checkpoint-only audit; current production services were already active and healthy, so no restart was required.
lastRun.nextTarget: Implement or stage the P1 long-running storage/SFTP sync/import task UX/backgrounding item, or a smaller bounded-list performance cleanup if it is the safer deployable batch.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
